policy.purpose: trend satellite CAGR uplift bypass audit input

scenario_sources.prices: Yahoo Adj Close research input for DBMF; not a manager statement or futures account ledger
scenario_sources.cta_proxy_role: bypass audit proxy for a small satellite allocation only
scenario_sources.tax_and_distribution: handled by the research friction model where applicable; not entity-specific tax advice

sensitivity_boundary.DBMF: starts in 2019 and does not contain 2008, 2011, or 2015 crisis evidence
sensitivity_boundary.confidence: LOW_SHORT_HISTORY unless a long-history CTA proxy or live account evidence is added
not_covered: live futures roll costs or manager replication error

failure_boundary.production_use: trend satellite results are research-only and must not alter the 10% default satellite without a separate approved audit
failure_boundary.long_history_proxy_missing: DBMF result cannot support a full-cycle production conclusion
failure_boundary.stage95_missing_or_unavailable: trend satellite result cannot be used for live capital allocation
failure_boundary.live_execution_gate_enabled: trend satellite audit must remain disconnected from broker order submission
